title: phyllanthus casticum f. boivinianus
intro: Phyllanthus casticum f. boivinianus, also known as Boivin's Phyllanthus, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and protecting against liver damage. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it is often used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine systems.
